title: papaver lisae
intro: Papaver lisae, also known as the Lisae poppy or California poppy, is a flowering plant species within the Papaver genus. The plant contains various alkaloids, including isoquinoline and benzylisoquinoline alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, particularly in pain relief and sedation. The medicinal properties of Papaver lisae may help alleviate symptoms of insomnia, anxiety, and muscle spasms, providing relief for individuals experiencing these conditions. Herbal preparations of Papaver lisae may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which should be used under the guidance of a medical professional due to potential interactions with other medications and individual sensitivities.
